---
title: Data Description
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
#| file: functions.R
```


```{r table-locations, eval = TRUE, echo = FALSE}
str00 <- print_table_metadata(
  channel, 
  locations = c("CPUE", "BIOMASS", "SIZECOMP", "AGECOMP", "AREA", 
                "SURVEY_DESIGN", "STRATUM_GROUPS", "SPECIES_YEAR",
                "TAXON_GROUPS", "CRUISE", "HAUL", "LENGTH", "METADATA_COLUMN", 
                "SPECIMEN", "TAXONOMIC_CLASSIFICATION", "TAXONOMIC_GROUPS") 
)
```

`r str00`

```{r rodbc-close}
RODBC::odbcCloseAll()
```
